title: borreria breviflora
intro: Borreria breviflora is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the short-flowered borreria, and is native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is used to treat various conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and is also believed to have antimalarial and antioxidant properties. Borreria breviflora is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine, typically administered in doses of 1-3 grams.
